summary: REHAU is a global polymer-based solutions company headquartered in Germany, with strong presence in Eastern Europe building solutions. Major player in underfloor heating, HVAC piping, and building technology. Expanding Poland operations (Śrem facility as central production/supply hub for Central Europe). Offers comprehensive trade distributor program. Key contact: Morne Smuts (morne.smuts@rehau.com).
notes: Major player in underfloor heating and building solutions across Eastern Europe. Potential distribution partner for circulating pumps as complement to their heating systems. Strong brand recognition in the region.
